name: aisentinel-sidecar
display_name: AISentinel Sidecar — Drop-in Policy Proxy for any stdio MCP server
description: Transparent policy proxy that wraps any stdio MCP server. Intercepts every tools/call, evaluates YAML policy, and writes a JSONL audit trail. Zero code changes to the wrapped server.
long_description: aisentinel-sidecar sits between an MCP client and any stdio MCP server (Claude Desktop, Cursor, Cline, LangGraph, etc.). It passes through all initialize / list / read traffic unchanged, but evaluates every tools/call invocation against a user-supplied YAML policy. The wrapped server is started as a child process; AISentinel never blocks reads, but blocks or gates writes according to policy.

policy_path.title: Policy YAML file (absolute path)
policy_path.description: Absolute path to a YAML policy file (allow / block / require_human_approval rules).

log_dir.title: Audit log directory
log_dir.description: Directory for the append-only JSONL audit log. Default: ~/.aisentinel

inner_command.title: Inner MCP server command
inner_command.description: Absolute path to the stdio MCP server binary to wrap (e.g. /usr/local/bin/echo-mcp). The sidecar starts it as a child process and proxies traffic through it.
